abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by attempting to disarm, trip, shove, grapple, or stun your foe, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} in close quarters, you may adraw on your momentum to gain advantage. If you do, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2) and choose one (before rolling).

  • Aggressive: Count a weak hit as a strong hit.
  • Defensive: Count a miss as a weak hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} already positioned in close-quarters against your foe, mark progress on a hit. On a strong hit with a match, your initial assault leaves them stunned also take +2 momentum
